title: neltuma nigra
intro: Neltuma nigra, also known as the Black Neltuma or Neltuma nigrum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Neltuma nigra is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
